name: Landrobe the Rock Vassal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>家</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>臣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ランドローブ
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, also Special Summon this card, and if you do, change that monster to face-down Defense Position. If this card is Tributed for a Tribute Summon: You can target 1 monster with 800 ATK and 1000 DEF in your Graveyard, except "Landrobe the Rock Vassal"; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Landrobe the Rock Vassal" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, also Special Summon this card, and if you do, change that monster to face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Landrobe the Rock Vassal" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
